# kubeflow

> kubeflow is a Kubernetes component. deploying 7 workload(s) (controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, deployment, deployment, manager) with 8 container(s). watching 11 resource type(s). exposing 3 service(s) on ports: 443, 8080. with 2 webhook(s) (1 validating, 1 mutating). runtime dependencies: MLflow, image-registry. exposing 5 Prometheus metrics. integrates with Istio, Prometheus, management relationship via labels/annotations. deploys kube-rbac-proxy sidecar for RBAC-based authorization.
